source_pr.title: plan: new plan support union scan.
source_pr.body:
When a txn is open, we always add a union scan on top of tabel scan or index scan.
@shenli @coocood @zimulala @winoros PTAL

symptoms: sql: "select * from t where a = 1 order by a", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select * from t where a = 1 order by a", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select * from t where a = 1 order by a", (plan/dag_plan_test.go)
files: plan/dag_plan_test.go, plan/logical_plan_test.go, plan/new_physical_plan_builder.go, plan/physical_plan_test.go, plan/stringer.go
